title: erigeron utahensis var. sparsifolius
intro: Erigeron utahensis var. sparsifolius, also known as the Utah fleabane, is a subspecies of the daisy-like Erigeron plant native to the dry regions of the western United States. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Erigeron utahensis var. sparsifolius include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote healing, making it a valuable natural remedy for various ailments. Erigeron utahensis var. sparsifolius can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
